properties.duration: Insufflated: 3-6 hours. | Intramuscular: 2-4 hours. | Intravenous: 1-3 hours.
properties.onset: Insufflated: 5-15 minutes. | Intramuscular: 1-5 minutes. | Intravenous: 1-2 minutes.
properties.summary: A very potent opioid that has an arylcyclohexylamine structure. Intial studies estimated that it was ~10,000x Morphine in animal studies. However that value has since decreased to ~504 times the potency of morphine for the trans-isomer.
